title: Ocean Constellation
description: Swirling blues and teals with golden dot patterns and sweeping black lines evoke the depth and mystery of the ocean at night.

title: Wattle Sky
description: Golden wattle blooms and pink-green leaves scatter across a brilliant blue sky, celebrating the colours of the Australian landscape.

title: Cobalt Night Garden
description: Deep cobalt blues and teals form the backdrop for luminous blue flowers with golden stems, evoking a lush midnight garden.

title: Teal Whispers
description: Vivid red and pink flowers with sweeping teal leaves on a soft yellow-green ground, full of movement and natural charm.

title: Jasmine Sea
description: Delicate white jasmine flowers and olive-green leaves drift across a bright sky-blue background, fresh and full of light.

title: Blush Over Water
description: Vibrant coral pinks and cool aqua tones collide in sweeping horizontal layers, with expressive white gestural marks dancing across the surface.

title: Lemon Blossom
description: Bright golden lemons and white blossoms on a soft green ground, with splashes of pink adding a playful, summery energy.

title: Joy Unleashed
description: A joyful explosion of pinks, oranges, blues and golds with swirling golden lines weaving through bold, energetic brushwork.

title: Petals In Champagne
description: Soft white blossoms and bold black spirals play across a warm champagne and gold ground, balancing delicacy with expressive energy.

title: Citrus Breeze
description: Bold lemons, limes and oranges swirl through a vibrant green landscape with expressive brushwork and energetic circular forms.

title: Marigold Inferno
description: Golden yellows and deep reds form bold marigold-like blooms with white swirling lines on a warm, sun-drenched background.

title: Corners In Blue
description: Geometric rectangles with golden accents float across a rich blue field, blending abstract structure with fluid, painterly movement.

title: Sunset Daisies
description: Bold white daisies bloom against a warm sunset palette of pinks, oranges and deep blues, with flowing pink tendrils connecting the composition.

title: Sherbet Mosaic (Pair)
description: Thick, tactile brushstrokes in soft pastels — peach, mint, pink and lilac — create a richly textured mosaic surface that begs to be touched.

title: Neon Coral Garden (Trio)
description: A vibrant triptych of three panels featuring neon orange gestural marks over a minty aqua ground with pops of yellow and blue.

title: Tangerine Falls
description: Rich tangerine orange dominates this dynamic piece, with dripping paint, bold splatter marks and vivid accents of blue, magenta and gold.

title: Florals In Flight
description: Soft pinks, peaches and yellows blossom across a dusky blue ground, with playful looping lines giving the flowers a sense of weightless movement.

title: Crimson Bloom Symphony
description: Fiery reds, hot pinks and burnt oranges burst with floral forms against a golden yellow ground — bold, warm and unapologetically vibrant.
